rationale: Surface shape is CWE-476 null-deref: `p = kstrdup(s, 0); use_string(p);` with no `if (!p)` guard. Axis-3 (unchecked_alloc_local) detects this directly at line 86 — verdict EXPLOITABLE on axis-3 alone. Axis-5 ADDS informational corroboration: `variant_ratio(kstrdup)` returns (9, 1) — the project's idiom IS to NULL-check kstrdup (9 of 10 sites check), so this 1 unchecked site is anomalous. The asymmetry is exposed to Stage D LLM as soft context. Phase 9 axis-5 doesn't change verdict (already EXPLOITABLE from axis-3); future axis-5-expansion may use the ratio to boost confidence or flag related variants. Crafted, not a real CVE.

lifecycle_precondition.notes: Crafted CWE-476 anomaly variant — uniform across the kstrdup family.
